constructor.details: Initializes the reputation registry with the factory address

params._factory: Address of the RevvFiFactory that will manage this registry

getBorrowerProfile(address).details: Returns complete borrowing profile for a borrowerReverts if borrower is not registered

returns._0: BorrowerProfile struct containing all history and current score

getReputationScore(address).details: Returns just the numerical reputation score

returns._0: Reputation score (0-1000) or 0 if borrower not registered

getRiskLabel(address).details: Converts numerical reputation score to letter risk ratingRisk mapping:      AAA: 900-1000 (Excellent)      AA:  800-899  (Very Good)      A:   700-799  (Good)      B:   500-699  (Fair)      C:   300-499  (Poor)      D:   0-299    (Default)

returns._0: RiskLabel from AAA (best) to D (worst), UNRATED for unregistered

isBorrowerRegistered(address).details: Checks if a borrower has been registered in the system

returns._0: True if borrower is registered, false otherwise

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

recordBorrowActivity(address,uint256).details: Updates borrower's total borrowed amount when they take a loan

recordDefault(address,uint256,uint256).details: Records a loan default and penalizes the borrower's reputationIncreases default count and recalculates reputation score

params.borrower: Address of the borrower who defaulted

recordSuccessfulRepayment(address,uint25.details: Updates borrower's repayment history and recalculates reputation scoreIncreases successful loans count and recalculates reputation score

registerBorrower(address).details: Creates a new borrower profile with starting reputation of 500Reverts if borrower is already registered

params.borrower: Address of the borrower to register

registerMarket(address).details: Authorizes a lending market to report borrower activity

params.market: Address of the lending market to approve

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

recordBorrowActivity(address,uint256).notice: Only callable by approved lending markets

recordDefault(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Only callable by approved lending markets

recordSuccessfulRepayment(address,uint25.notice: Only callable by approved lending markets

registerBorrower(address).notice: Only callable by the factory contract

registerMarket(address).notice: Only callable by the factory contract
